_instructions: Client intake for Camenzuli Dental Excellence - extracted from master document

doctor.name: Dr. Camenzuli, DDS
doctor.title: FAGD, ICOI, FACD - General & Sedation Dentist
credentials: Fellow, International College of Oral Implantologists (ICOI)
Near-Mastership AGD (58 CE hours toward MAGD)
doctor.bio_short: Dr. Camenzuli has spent 25 years building the clinical capability to help patients who would otherwise avoid care entirely. His mother lost all her teeth by age 16 due to dental fear - that experience drove him to pursue three fellowships, IV sedation licensure, and advanced implant protocols. He treats the full scope of dental care in-house, without the referrals and fragmented experience that most general practices require.
